rationale: Review 1's finding is correct and material to proof-quality: the call `LinearMap.algHom_comp_convMul_distrib f.ofConv (toConv (antipode R)) (toConv LinearMap.id)` in convInv_mul_cancel (diff lines 119-120) relies on a non-obvious implicit instantiation of the Mathlib lemma (its A becomes H and B becomes A from the proof context) that the surrounding comments do not document, and explicit args or a clarifying comment would improve readability without altering semantics. Review 2's approve therefore leaves a demonstrably less clear proof; the resulting PR after Review 1 is better.
